﻿temple = {
	is_foreign = no
	max_levels = 1
	pop_type = clergy

	employment_size = religious_building_employment

	category = religious_category

	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes


	build_time = religious_building_time


	possible_production_methods = {
		temple_maintenance
	}

	graphical_tags = { small_religious }


	construction_demand = town_building_construction


	modifier = {
		local_clergy_max_literacy = 10
		local_unrest = -0.025
		local_clergy_pop_growth = 0.25
	}

}

	is_foreign = no

	pop_type = laborers
	forbidden_for_estates = yes

	employment_size = construction_employment

	category = infrastructure_category

	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes

	build_time = government_build_time


	unique_production_methods = {
		construction_center_maintenance = {
			masonry = 0.2
			tools = 0.25
			category = building_maintenance
		}
	}


	construction_demand = town_building_construction


	modifier = {
		max_constructions_at_same_time = 1
	}

}

	category = infrastructure_category

	rural_settlement = no

	unique_production_methods = {
		granary_maintenance = {
			masonry = 0.2
			category = building_maintenance
		}
	}


	construction_demand = granary_construction



	modifier = {
		local_food_capacity = 200
		local_food_decay_modifier = -0.05
	}

	ai_forbid_shutdown = yes
}

fortress_granary = { #https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Agadir_(granary)
	is_special = yes
	is_foreign = no
	max_levels = 1
	pop_type = peasants

	rural_settlement = no
	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes

	employment_size = granary_employment
	category = defense_category

	build_time = medium_fort_building

	country_potential = {
		culture = { has_culture_group = culture_group:maghrebi_group }
	}

	location_potential = {
	}

	expensive = yes

	construction_demand = fortress_granary_construction

	modifier = {
		local_garrison_size = 0.1
		local_food_capacity = 250
		local_defensive = 0.25
	}

	unique_production_methods = {
		fortress_granary_maintenance = {
			wheat = 0.1
			masonry = 0.2
			weaponry = 0.05
			cloth = 0.05
			copper = 0.025
			tin = 0.01
			potential = {
				any_market_present_in_country = {
					is_produced_in_market = goods:wheat
				}
			}
			allow = {
				scope:target ?= { market ?= {  is_produced_in_market = goods:wheat } }
			}
			category = building_maintenance
		}

		fortress_millet_granary_maintenance = {
			millet = 0.1
			masonry = 0.2
			weaponry = 0.05
			cloth = 0.05
			copper = 0.025
			tin = 0.01
			potential = {
				any_market_present_in_country = {
					is_produced_in_market = goods:millet
				}
			}
			allow = {
				scope:target ?= {  market ?= { is_produced_in_market = goods:millet } }
			}
			category = building_maintenance
		}

		fortress_rice_granary_maintenance = {
			rice = 0.1
			masonry = 0.2
			weaponry = 0.05
			cloth = 0.05
			copper = 0.025
			tin = 0.01
			potential = {
				any_market_present_in_country = {
					is_produced_in_market = goods:rice
				}
			}
			allow = {
				scope:target ?= { market ?= {  is_produced_in_market = goods:rice } }
			}
			category = building_maintenance
		}

		fortress_maize_granary_maintenance = {
			maize = 0.1
			masonry = 0.2
			weaponry = 0.05
			cloth = 0.05
			copper = 0.025
			tin = 0.01
			potential = {
				any_market_present_in_country = {
					is_produced_in_market = goods:maize
				}
			}
			allow = {
				scope:target ?= {market ?= { is_produced_in_market = goods:maize } }
			}
			category = building_maintenance
		}

		fortress_qullqa_maintenance = {
			potato = 0.08
			maize = 0.02
			masonry = 0.2
			weaponry = 0.05
			cloth = 0.05
			copper = 0.025
			tin = 0.01
			potential = {
				any_market_present_in_country = {
					is_produced_in_market = goods:potato
					is_produced_in_market = goods:maize
				}
			}
			allow = {
				scope:target ?= { market ?= {
						is_produced_in_market = goods:potato
						is_produced_in_market = goods:maize
					}
				}
			}
			category = building_maintenance
		}
	}
}

	is_foreign = no
	max_levels = 1
	pop_type = burghers

	employment_size = generic_burgher_employment

	category = naval_category

	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes

	location_potential = {
		is_coastal = yes
	}

	

	build_time = medium_port_building_time
	
	unique_production_methods = {
		wharf_maintenance = {
			tar = 0.1
			naval_supplies = 0.05
			tools = 0.1
			lumber = 0.1
			category = building_maintenance
		}

	}




	construction_demand = town_building_construction

	modifier = {
		local_sailors = 0.001
		local_merchant_capacity = 0.1
		can_build_ships_in_this_location = yes
		harbor_suitability = 0.1
		local_repair_speed = 0.01
	}
}

pest_house = {
	is_foreign = no
	pop_type = clergy
	max_levels = 1
	employment_size = clergy_medical_employment
	category = infrastructure_category

	rural_settlement = yes
	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes

	build_time = super_fast_temporary_house

	country_potential = {
		is_situation_active = situation:black_death
		custom_tooltip = {
				text = pest_house_tt
				modifier:enable_pest_house = yes
			}
	}
	
	remove_if = {
		OR = {
			NOT = { is_situation_active = situation:black_death }
			owner = {
				AND = {
					modifier:enable_pest_house = no
					trigger_if = {
						limit = {
							is_subject = yes
						}
						overlord = { modifier:enable_pest_house = no }
					}
				}
			}
		}
	}

	unique_production_methods = {
		pest_house_maintenance = {
			fiber_crops = 0.10
			incense = 0.10
			category = building_maintenance
		}
	}
	construction_demand = town_building_construction
	modifier = {
		local_disease_resistance = 0.3
		local_unrest = 0.1
	}
}

	employment_size = clergy_medical_employment

	construction_demand = town_building_construction

		local_life_expectancy = 5

slave_market = {
	is_foreign = no
	max_levels = slave_market_max_level
	pop_type = burghers

	category = government_category


	employment_size = trade_employment


	rural_settlement = no
	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes


	country_potential = {
		religion.group != religion_group:christian
	}


	allow = {
		scope:actor = {
			has_slavery = yes
		}
	}

	remove_if = {
		scope:actor = {
			has_slavery = no
		}
	}

	

	build_time = generic_town_build_time

	unique_production_methods = {

		slave_market_maintenance = {
			leather = 0.5
			tools = 0.45
			weaponry = 0.4
			paper = 0.35

			produced = slaves_goods
			output = 2.1


			category = building_maintenance
		}


	}

	modifier = {
		building_enslavement_power = 0.02
		local_slave_pop_satisfaction = -0.025
	}



	construction_demand = town_building_construction

}


#Aqueducts

aqueduct_system = {
	content_priority = 100
	is_foreign = no
	max_levels = aqueduct_system_max_level 
	pop_type = laborers
	forbidden_for_estates = yes

	employment_size = aqueduct_system_employment
	price = expand_aqueduct_system

	category = infrastructure_category

	town = yes
	city = yes
	megalopolis = yes

	build_time = infrastructure_build_time

	country_potential = {
		OR = {
			tag = BYZ
			tag = ROM

			owns = location:constantinople
			owns = location:rome
			owns = location:avignon
			owns = location:segovia
		}
	}

	location_potential = {
		OR = {
			this = location:constantinople
			this = location:rome
			this = location:avignon
			this = location:segovia
		}
	}

	possible_production_methods = { aqueduct_system_maintenance }

	construction_demand = aqueduct_system_construction

	modifier = {
		local_disease_resistance = 0.1
		local_monthly_food_modifier = 0.15
		local_monthly_prosperity = 0.001
		local_monthly_development_modifier = 0.1
	}

	capital_country_modifier = {
		monthly_legitimacy = 0.1
		monthly_republican_tradition = 0.1
		monthly_devotion = 0.1
	}
}
